# SMSRoute Guides

> Practical guides to no-KYC SMS APIs, crypto-billed messaging (BTC/ETH/USDT/XMR/LTC/SOL),
> and Twilio-class alternatives without business verification. By SMSRoute (https://smsroute.cc)
> — 149 countries, from $0.004 per message, email-only signup.

## Guides

- [Which SMS Gateway Supports Alphanumeric Sender IDs Cheaply?](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/alphanumeric-sender-id-sms-api.html): SMSRoute supports custom alphanumeric sender IDs on request from $0.004/msg. No KYC, crypto billing, 149 countries. Real alphanumeric ID support explained.
- [Best Anonymous SMS Sending Service for Developers](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/anonymous-sms-api-for-developers.html): SMSRoute is an anonymous SMS API for developers: no KYC signup, crypto (6 coins), 149 countries, from $0.004/msg. Code samples in Python, PHP, Go, Node.
- [SMSRoute: No-KYC SMS API for OTP Without ID](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/best-no-kyc-sms-api.html): SMSRoute offers a no-KYC SMS API to send OTP without identity documents. Instant signup, crypto billing from $0.004/message. No ID or business verification.
- [Bulk SMS Without Registration – No Signup Verification](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/bulk-sms-no-registration.html): Send bulk SMS without registration or KYC. SMSRoute gives API key in minutes with crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT, XMR, LTC, SOL). No docs, no contracts. Start now.
- [Cheapest SMS API for International Bulk Sending](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/cheapest-international-bulk-sms-api.html): SMSRoute is the cheapest SMS API for international bulk sending: from $0.004/msg, 149 countries, crypto billing, no KYC. Benchmark prices below.
- [Crypto SMS API: BTC, ETH, USDT, XMR, LTC, SOL | SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/crypto-sms-api.html): SMSRoute is the definitive crypto SMS API. Fund with BTC, ETH, USDT, XMR, LTC, SOL. No KYC, no card, no invoice. From $0.004/message. 149 countries.
- [Custom Sender ID Without KYC – Branded SMS No Verification](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/custom-sender-id-no-kyc.html): Send branded SMS with custom sender ID, zero KYC. SMSRoute: email signup, crypto billing, custom IDs on request. No documents. First message in minutes.
- [Pay for SMS with Bitcoin – Buy SMS Credits with BTC](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/pay-for-sms-with-bitcoin.html): Step-by-step guide to fund SMSRoute with Bitcoin (BTC). No KYC, instant top-up, on-chain vs low-fee coins explained. Buy SMS credits with BTC today.
- [Pay for SMS API with USDT – Buy SMS Credits with Crypto](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/pay-sms-api-with-usdt.html): Step-by-step guide to paying for SMSRoute API with USDT (TRC-20 vs ERC-20 fees). Buy SMS credits with crypto, no KYC, from $0.004/message. 149 countries.
- [Privacy-Focused SMS API for Crypto Projects | SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/privacy-sms-api-crypto-projects.html): SMSRoute is a no-KYC SMS API for crypto projects: no identity docs, crypto billing (BTC/ETH/XMR), OTP delivery from $0.004/msg. 149 countries, 99.9% uptime.
- [Send SMS Programmatically Without a Phone Number (API Guide)](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-programmatically-without-phone-number.html): Learn how to send SMS programmatically without a phone number using SMSRoute's no-KYC API. Crypto billing, alphanumeric sender IDs, and code samples in Python, PHP, Go, Node.
- [Send SMS to a List Anonymously – Privacy Bulk SMS](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-a-list-anonymously.html): Send SMS to a list anonymously with SMSRoute: no ID signup, crypto billing, custom sender ID. Bulk SMS to your contacts with real privacy. Opt-in only.
- [Send SMS to a Whole Contact List Without an Account](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-a-list-no-account.html): Send SMS to your opt-in list without KYC. SMSRoute's no-kyc bulk API accepts crypto, custom sender IDs, and CSV upload. No contracts, no card required.
- [Cheapest Bulk SMS Bangladesh: Send at $0.004/msg with SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-bangladesh-cheap.html): Send SMS to Bangladesh cheaply from $0.004/message. No KYC, crypto billing, real-time DLRs. Python/PHP/Go code samples. 99.9% uptime. Start in minutes.
- [Cheapest Bulk SMS Brazil: Send to BR from $0.004](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-brazil-cheap.html): Send SMS to Brazil cheaply with SMSRoute. From $0.004/msg, no KYC, crypto billing, 99.9% uptime. Auto refunds, sample code, start in minutes.
- [Cheapest SMS to Egypt: $0.004/msg, No KYC, Crypto](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-egypt-cheap.html): Send SMS to Egypt from $0.004 per message. No KYC, crypto billing (BTC/ETH/USDT), real sender IDs, 99.9% uptime. SMSRoute API, signup in minutes.
- [Cheapest Bulk SMS India: Send to India from $0.004](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-india-cheap.html): Send SMS to India cheaply with SMSRoute. From $0.004/msg, no KYC, crypto pay-as-you-go, no DLT registration needed. Real code examples. Start in minutes.
- [Cheapest SMS to Indonesia: $0.004/msg via SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-indonesia-cheap.html): Send SMS to Indonesia from $0.004 per message. No KYC, crypto billing, 99.9% uptime. Real pricing, sample code, and delivery notes. Start in minutes.
- [Send SMS to Nigeria Cheaply – Cheapest Bulk SMS Nigeria](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-nigeria-cheap.html): Send SMS to Nigeria from $0.004/message with SMSRoute. No KYC, crypto billing, real delivery. Python/PHP/Go/Node code included. No signup fees. Start in minutes.
- [Send SMS to Pakistan from $0.004/msg via SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-pakistan-cheap.html): Send SMS to Pakistan from $0.004/msg with SMSRoute. No KYC, crypto billing (6 coins), real DLRs, code examples, free test credits, no minimums.
- [Cheapest SMS to Philippines – Send for $0.004/msg with SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-to-philippines-cheap.html): Send SMS to the Philippines cheaply from $0.004/msg. No KYC, crypto billing, real DLRs. Direct routes vs grey routes explained. Sample code included.
- [Send SMS Without an Account – No-Signup SMS API](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-without-account.html): Send SMS without an account with SMSRoute. Get an API key in minutes with no KYC, no documents, and crypto billing. Start sending from $0.004.
- [Send SMS Without KYC or ID: 3 Routes + SMSRoute Quickstart](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-without-kyc-or-id.html): Send SMS without KYC or ID using no-KYC API, rental sites, or burner apps. 5-step SMSRoute quickstart with code. No documents, crypto billing, from $0.004.
- [Send SMS Without Phone Number Online – No SIM Needed](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/send-sms-without-phone-number-online.html): Send SMS without a phone number or SIM card using SMSRoute's no-KYC API. Alphanumeric sender IDs, crypto billing, from $0.004/msg. No identity docs required.
- [Which SMS API Accepts Bitcoin? Crypto Bulk SMS Guide](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-api-accepts-bitcoin-crypto.html): SMS API that accepts Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, Monero, Litecoin, Solana. No-KYC SMSRoute offers auto-confirm crypto billing from $0.004. Compare providers.
- [SMS API for India Without DLT Registration](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-api-india-without-dlt.html): Send SMS to India without DLT using SMSRoute's no-KYC API. Crypto billing, instant activation, real-time delivery for international senders.
- [SMS API That Accepts Monero (XMR) – SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-api-monero-xmr.html): SMSRoute is the SMS API that accepts Monero (XMR) with no KYC. Top up with XMR, send messages globally from $0.004. No identity docs, no contracts. Try free credits.
- [SMS Provider Without US 10DLC Registration – SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-api-without-10dlc-registration.html): SMSRoute works without US 10DLC registration. No KYC, crypto billing, international routing from $0.004/msg. Send globally in minutes. No vetting, no delays.
- [SMS Gateway with Crypto Billing & No Monthly Contract](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-gateway-crypto-billing-no-contract.html): SMSRoute: pay-as-you-go SMS API with crypto billing (BTC, ETH, USDT, XMR, LTC, SOL). No monthly minimums, no KYC, auto-credit failures. From $0.004/msg.
- [SMS Marketing Platform No KYC – Bulk SMS No Verification](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-marketing-no-kyc.html): Send bulk SMS marketing without KYC or ID verification. SMSRoute offers crypto billing, custom sender names, API access with no vetting. Start in minutes.
- [SMS OTP API Without KYC – No ID, No Wait | SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/sms-otp-api-no-kyc.html): Send SMS OTP/2FA codes without KYC. No ID, no business vetting. Crypto billing, from $0.004/msg, 149 countries. Python/PHP/Go/Node examples. | SMSRoute
- [SMS API No Verification – No ID, No Business Docs](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/text-message-api-no-verification.html): SMSRoute: text message API with no verification. No ID or business docs needed. Email signup, crypto billing, API key in minutes. Send globally from $0.004.
- [Twilio Alternative Without Business Verification – SMSRoute](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/twilio-alternative-no-business-verification.html): SMSRoute is the Twilio alternative without business verification. No KYC, no docs. Sign up with email, fund with crypto, send in minutes. From $0.004/msg.
- [SMS API Alternative to Vonage/Plivo Without Vetting](https://smsroute-cc.github.io/vonage-plivo-alternative-no-vetting.html): SMSRoute is the no-vetting SMS API alternative to Vonage/Plivo. Sign up with email, fund with crypto, send in minutes. No KYC, no 10DLC. From $0.004/msg.

## Main site

- [SMSRoute](https://smsroute.cc/): no-KYC SMS API homepage
- [Pricing](https://smsroute.cc/prices/): from $0.004 per message
- [API docs](https://smsroute.cc/api/): REST + SMPP reference
